meta.title: MarchEng | Engineering and Energy
meta.description: End-to-end solar engineering since 2017. Detailed engineering, commissioning, technical due diligence and photovoltaic plants across Brazil.

hero.headline: Beyond price, we deliver the <accent>quality</accent> that transforms.
hero.subheadline: End-to-end solar engineering since 2017. 100+ grid-connected plants and 200 MW of approved grid access across Brazil.

services.title: Five technical fronts, from design to operation.
services.subtitle: We cover the full lifecycle of a solar plant — from detailed engineering to assisted operation in the field.

solar.title: Solar Engineering
solar.description: Complete solar plant design covering Electrical, Civil, Communications and Security disciplines.

electrical.title: Electrical Engineering
electrical.description: Short-circuit, selectivity, grounding, power quality studies and on-site measurements.

owner.title: Owner's Engineering
owner.description: Technical oversight through the entire project cycle, with reports and compliance assessments.

commissioning.title: Commissioning & Maintenance
commissioning.description: End-to-end technical verification and maintenance of solar plants, with a rigorous testing schedule.

dueDiligence.title: Technical Due Diligence
dueDiligence.description: Technical audit of solar plants for acquisition, refinancing or performance analysis.

about.title: Solar engineering, with the experience of those who have been in the sector since 2017.
about.paragraph1: MarchEng Engineering has been operating since 2017 in solar and electrical energy. From detailed design to plant start-up, we provide complete technical support with a team of specialists committed to the highest engineering and safety standards.
about.paragraph2: The MarchEng name carries the founder's Italian heritage — the Marchesini family, originally from Felonica, in the province of Mantua, Lombardy. It is a daily reminder that engineering is a craft, not a shortcut: technical rigor, respected deadlines, and the commitment to bringing every plant online.

clients.title: Companies that trust MarchEng
clients.subtitle: Partners who trust us with the technical cycle of their plants.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: Our technical team is ready to assess your needs.

footer.tagline: Engineering and energy with technical precision and a commitment to a sustainable future since 2017.
